data.title: USDDOLD Collateral Ratio to Be Reduced in April
data.description:
The collateral ratio for USDDOLD is set to be lowered in April. According to ChainCatcher, this adjustment is part of the delisting process for USDDOLD. The JustLend DAO protocol plans to modify the collateral ratio for the USDDOLD market around April, with the final plan to be implemented following approval from the USDD and JustLend DAO community proposals.

Users utilizing USDDOLD as collateral are advised to switch to other supported assets in advance and closely monitor their account risk status to prevent any impact on position security due to changes in the collateral ratio.

data.title: State Attorneys General Challenge Nexstar's $3.5 Billion Acquisition of Tegna
data.description: A coalition of state attorneys general has filed a lawsuit to prevent Nexstar Media Group's $3.5 billion acquisition of Tegna Inc. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this legal action aims to halt the formation of what would become the largest operator of local television stations in the United States. The attorneys general argue that the merger could potentially reduce competition and harm consumers by consolidating media ownership. The lawsuit underscores concerns about the impact on local news coverage and advertising markets. Nexstar, already a significant player in the broadcasting industry, seeks to expand its reach through this acquisition. The outcome of this legal challenge could have significant implications for the media landscape in the country.

data.title: ECB President: Downside risks to economic growth outlook
data.description: ECB President Christine Lagarde: Rising energy prices will push inflation above 2% in the short term. ECB President Christine Lagarde: Longer-term inflation expectations are around 2%. ECB President Christine Lagarde: Prolonged war could keep energy prices high for a longer period, eroding incomes. ECB President Christine Lagarde: Risks to the economic growth outlook are tilted to the downside. (Jinshi)

data.title: Animoca Brands announced a strategic investment and partnership with Ava Labs.
data.description: Animoca Brands announced a strategic investment and partnership with Ava Labs on the X platform to support the growth and adoption of the Avalanche ecosystem. This collaboration combines Avalanche's scalable architecture with institutional access and distribution channels to strengthen Avalanche's position as a leading platform for real-world blockchain applications.

data.title: MLB establishes exclusive partnership with Polymarket
data.description: Major League Baseball (MLB) has reached new agreements with Polymarket and the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC). MLB has established an exclusive partnership with Polymarket, allowing the latter to use its trademarks and logos, and Polymarket will receive promotional placements on MLB's website and at games. MLB has also signed a memorandum of understanding with the CFTC covering information sharing and the protection of game integrity. MLB Commissioner Rob Manfred stated that the new agreements with Polymarket and the CFTC are a key step in proactively managing the rapidly growing prediction market sector. MLB will work with Polymarket to restrict transactions involving game integrity risks, such as contracts related to individual pitching, coaching decisions, and umpire performance. The CFTC is currently seeking to solidify its position as the sole regulator of prediction markets, while state officials consider prediction markets to be gambling operations. This week, the Arizona Attorney General filed criminal charges against Kalshi, alleging that it operated an illegal betting platform. Kalshi CEO Tarek Mansour and CFTC Chairman Michael Selig both called the charges an overreach of state authority.

data.title: Major League Baseball Formalizes Involvement in Prediction Markets
data.description: Major League Baseball (MLB) has established new agreements with Polymarket and the federal regulator responsible for overseeing prediction markets. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the sports league's formal entry into this rapidly expanding sector. These agreements mark a significant step for MLB as it navigates the evolving landscape of prediction markets, which have gained considerable traction in recent years. The collaboration aims to enhance MLB's engagement with fans and stakeholders by leveraging the innovative capabilities of prediction markets. This move reflects MLB's commitment to exploring new avenues for growth and interaction within the sports industry.

data.title: Federal Reserve Considers Capital Adjustments Impacting Major U.S. Banks
data.description: The Federal Reserve is currently evaluating a series of capital adjustment measures that could reduce the capital adequacy ratio of the largest banks in the United States by 4.8%. According to Jin10, these adjustments are part of ongoing efforts to ensure financial stability and resilience within the banking sector. The proposed changes aim to address potential vulnerabilities and enhance the overall robustness of the financial system. The Federal Reserve's considerations come amid a broader context of economic uncertainty and evolving regulatory landscapes. The impact of these measures on the banking industry and the wider economy remains a subject of close scrutiny by financial analysts and policymakers.

data.title: U.S. Senate Committee Approves Trump's Nominee for Homeland Security Secretary
data.description: The U.S. Senate Committee has voted to approve U.S. President Donald Trump's nominee, Marquinn Marlin, for the position of Homeland Security Secretary. According to Jin10, this decision marks a significant step in the administration's efforts to fill key positions within the government. Marlin's nomination will now proceed to the full Senate for a final confirmation vote. The approval comes amid ongoing discussions about national security and immigration policies. Marlin is expected to play a crucial role in shaping the department's strategies and addressing current challenges. The committee's decision reflects the administration's confidence in Marlin's ability to lead the Department of Homeland Security effectively.

data.title: Lufthansa CEO: Finalizing Talks with Airbus and Boeing for New Wide-Body Aircraft Orders
data.description: Lufthansa is in the final stages of negotiations with Airbus and Boeing to order new wide-body aircraft, according to Jin10. The airline's CEO emphasized the importance of these discussions as part of their strategy to modernize and expand their fleet. This move is seen as a significant step in enhancing Lufthansa's operational capabilities and maintaining its competitive edge in the aviation industry.

data.title: Binance Futures to Introduce USDⓈ-Margined EDGEUSDT Contract
data.description: Binance Futures is set to launch pre-market trading for the USDⓈ-margined EDGEUSDT perpetual contract on March 19, 2026. According to BWEnews, this announcement marks a significant development for traders interested in the EDGEUSDT market. The current market capitalization of EDGE stands at $26 million, although this figure may be subject to inaccuracies due to automatic matching errors.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Elon Musk's Grok AI Seeks Financial Expertise Amid HSBC Job Cuts
data.description: Elon Musk's Grok AI is actively seeking to enhance its financial capabilities by hiring bankers. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the initiative aimed at improving the chatbot's proficiency in finance-related tasks. Meanwhile, HSBC is considering the potential impact of AI on its workforce, with discussions suggesting that up to 20,000 jobs could be affected by the integration of AI technologies. The bank is exploring how AI might streamline operations and reduce the need for human intervention in certain areas. This development underscores the growing influence of AI in the financial sector, as companies seek to leverage technology for efficiency and cost reduction.

data.title: Bank of England Governor's Remarks Lead Traders to Reduce Rate Hike Bets
data.description: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey's recent comments have prompted traders to scale back their expectations for interest rate hikes. According to Jin10, Bailey's speech influenced market sentiment, leading to adjustments in trading strategies. The governor's remarks were closely watched by investors, who are now reassessing their positions in light of potential changes in monetary policy. Bailey's insights into the economic outlook and inflation trends have been pivotal in shaping market expectations. Traders are now considering the implications of his statements on future rate decisions, reflecting a shift in the financial landscape.

data.title: Iranian attacks cause Qatar to lose 17% of its annual LNG exports.
data.description: Qatar Energy CEO Saad al-Qaeda said on Thursday that the Iranian attack will cost Qatar 12.8 million tons of liquefied natural gas annually over the next three to five years, representing about 17% of Qatar's liquefied natural gas exports. He stated, "I never imagined Qatar—and the entire region—would suffer such a severe attack, especially during Ramadan, that a brotherly Muslim country would attack us in this way." (Jin Shi)

data.title: Polymarket's probability that "gold will fall below $4,700 by the end of March" has risen to 95%.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that the probability of gold falling below $4,700 by the end of March on Polymarket has rapidly risen to 95%, a 56% increase in the last 24 hours. Gold prices have indeed fallen sharply today, with current gold futures prices below $4,700 per ounce. Note: This data is based on the settlement price of the CME Group's gold (GC) futures main contract, not the spot price. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Global assets were generally under pressure, with precious metals and European stock indices experiencing significant pullbacks.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices fell to $4,557.45 per ounce, a daily drop of 5.42%. Silver prices fell to $67.852 per ounce, a daily drop of 9.97%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 55.31, a daily increase of 5.88%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 78.65, a daily increase of 3.26%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate rose 0.08% to 6.90547. The USD/JPY exchange rate fell 0.56% to 158.787. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 fell 1.25% to 5,578.89 points; the UK FTSE 100 fell 2.17% to 10,004.82 points; and the German DAX 40 fell 1.53% to 22,789.13 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 1.94% to $97.61 per barrel, while Brent crude oil rose 1.66% to $112.74 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Qatar Energy CEO Warns of Potential Force Majeure on LNG Contracts with Italy, Belgium, and South Korea
data.description: Qatar Energy's CEO has indicated that the company may need to declare force majeure on long-term liquefied natural gas (LNG) supply contracts with Italy, Belgium, and South Korea. According to Jin10, the potential declaration could affect contracts for up to five years. This announcement comes amid ongoing challenges in the global energy market, which have impacted supply chains and contract fulfillment. The CEO's statement highlights the difficulties faced by energy providers in maintaining consistent supply amidst geopolitical and economic pressures. The potential force majeure declaration underscores the volatility in the energy sector and the need for adaptive strategies to manage unforeseen disruptions.

data.title: UAE and Egypt Discuss Regional Security Amid Rising Tensions
data.description: On March 19, UAE President Mohammed met with visiting Egyptian President Abdel Fattah el-Sisi in Abu Dhabi. According to Jin10, the leaders discussed bilateral cooperation and the current situation in the Middle East. Both parties expressed concern over the severe impact of ongoing military escalations on regional and international security and stability. President el-Sisi affirmed Egypt's support for the UAE's measures to safeguard national security, territorial integrity, and the safety of its people. They emphasized the need to halt the escalation immediately and resolve regional issues through dialogue and diplomacy to prevent further tensions and crises, thereby maintaining regional security and stability.

data.title: Germany Considers Windfall Tax as Fuel Prices Surge Due to Iran Conflict
data.description: Fuel prices have surged significantly as a result of the ongoing conflict in Iran. According to Jin10, Germany is contemplating the introduction of a windfall tax to address the economic impact of rising fuel costs. The conflict has disrupted oil supplies, leading to increased prices globally. Germany's potential tax measure aims to mitigate the financial burden on consumers and stabilize the market. The situation remains tense, with geopolitical factors continuing to influence the energy sector.

data.title: Pro-Kremlin Activist Criticizes Putin Amid Ukraine Conflict
data.description:
Ilya Remeslo, a prominent pro-Kremlin activist, has publicly criticized Russian President Vladimir Putin, marking a notable shift in sentiment regarding the ongoing conflict in Ukraine. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Remeslo's unexpected stance, which reflects growing dissatisfaction with the war among some Kremlin supporters.

Remeslo, who has been known for his attacks on Russian opposition leader Alexey Navalny, expressed his discontent with Putin's handling of the situation. This criticism comes as the war in Ukraine continues to strain Russia's resources and international relations.

The activist's comments underscore a broader fatigue with the prolonged conflict, which has seen significant casualties and economic repercussions. As the war drags on, voices of dissent within Russia are becoming more pronounced, challenging the government's narrative and approach.

This development adds to the complexities faced by the Kremlin as it navigates both domestic and international pressures related to the Ukraine war. The criticism from a previously staunch supporter like Remeslo may signal a shift in public opinion, potentially influencing future political dynamics in Russia.

data.title: S&P 500 Stocks Show Extreme Oversold Levels
data.description: As of today, 48.2% of S&P 500 stocks are considered oversold, while only 10.2% are overbought. Bespoke Investment Group posted on X that these figures represent the most extreme levels since the tariff-related market fluctuations of last spring. This trend indicates a significant shift in market dynamics, reflecting investor sentiment and market volatility. The current oversold condition suggests potential opportunities for investors, although it also highlights underlying market concerns. The disparity between oversold and overbought stocks underscores the ongoing uncertainty in the financial markets.
